## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and outbound marketing plans.](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Knapsack app now publicly available for download, seeing initial organic traffic uptick](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [SEO performance improving: 47 clicks/week, 1% CTR, rankings improving for target keywords](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Shifting focus to outbound marketing, leveraging SmartLead for email campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Need to emphasize Knapsack's unique privacy features and automations in marketing messaging](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)

## Topics

### Website and App Updates

  - [Knapsack app now publicly available for download on website](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Site redesign live with updated fonts, maintaining same fundamental structure](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Planning to move off Webflow in the future](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

### SEO and Content Performance

  - 173 clicks total, 70k impressions, 1% CTR (improved from \<1%)
  - [Organic traffic \~508/month, spike since Nov 3rd](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [47 clicks this week despite lower impressions due to publishing delay](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Rankings improving: more blogs in top 5 positions on Google](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Mix of top, middle, and bottom of funnel content planned](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

### Outbound Marketing Strategy

  - [Shifting focus to outbound efforts using SmartLead](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Previous email campaigns (via AI SDR) had high open rates but low engagement](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [New approach: test various subject lines and email copy, aim for 60-70% open rates](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Target ICPs: Independent Financial Advisors, RIAs (Registered Investment Advisors)](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [Key messaging: data privacy, AI automations to save time](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)

### Knapsack's Unique Selling Points

  - [Files never stored elsewhere, Knapsack doesn't see user files](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [Need to emphasize privacy features similar to Apple's approach](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=2769.0)
  - [Consider creating visual comparison of Knapsack vs other AI tools for privacy](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=2769.0)
  - [Update compliance page with FAQ for IT/legal teams](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=2633.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jimmy to send list of 20 domains for Mark to approve](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)
  - [Set up email inboxes for outbound campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
  - [Draft 5-6 email templates with various subject lines and copy](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
  - [Update website to better highlight Knapsack's privacy features](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=2682.0)
  - [Create visual comparison of Knapsack vs other AI tools for privacy](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=2769.0)
  - [Update compliance page with user-friendly FAQ](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=2633.0)
  - [Launch outbound email campaigns after 2-week warmup (early December)](https://fathom.video/share/negGLwEAnA-wHXc1o1PqpB-tr-fC_N9q?tab=summary&timestamp=2942.0)
